en.text: apparently a primary verb (properly, θρέχω; compare G2359); which uses δρέμω (the base of G1408) as alternate in certain tenses; to run or walk hastily (literally or figuratively)

senses.gloss_en: apparently a primary verb (properly, θρέχω; compare G2359); which uses δρέμω (the base of G1408) as alternate in certain tenses; to run or walk hastily (literally or figuratively)
